name: 37 · Internal Model Pool Agent
description: Model-pool P1 (docs/28 + docs/29) — an Agent step bound to a self-hosted model that is served through the in-cluster inference router, never net-admitted. The Agent runs a SINGLE-SHOT degenerate loop (no tools, maxTurns 1) so it deploys on the plain dev executor; the inference HTTP call goes `base_url → router` via the bound `internal_pool_router` (`internal_llm`) resource, which is the whole point of the model-pool seam (inference bypasses the engine Petri net + the presence net). The model id `llama3.2:1b` (small + fast so the degenerate inference completes inside the template-test's 60s wall clock — a reasoning 9B does not) is curated in the `internal_pool_registry` (`model_registry`) approved SET alongside the default `qwen3.5:9b`, both seeded `loaded` in `model_states` and loaded resident by `up-model-runner`, so `GET /api/v1/models` reports each loaded+available and the editor's internal-pool Model picker offers them. The compiled wire provider is `openai` (OpenAI-compatible router path — the executor `Provider` enum knows only openai/anthropic/ollama; `internal` is the FE-only routing signal that selects the `internal_llm` resource type and locks per-step base_url/api_key overrides for GDPR). Live e2e: the fixture's `base_url` is `${MEKHAN_ROUTER_URL}` (the demo seeder interpolates it to this dev slot's live `inference-router`, e.g. `http://localhost:13200`), so the inference HTTP call goes node → router → Ollama and is metered on the router's `/metrics` + inference-audit ledger. The dev router is unauthenticated, so `internal_pool_router` carries no `api_key`. Requires `just dev` (brings up the managed Ollama + the model runner + the router) — change `data.model.model` + the registry/model_states fixtures together if you override `OLLAMA_MODEL`.
